task_completion.description: Verify that third party 'NovaCrest Technologies' has been registered in Eramba with a description mentioning IaaS, SOC 2, FedRAMP, and Austin TX.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Third Parties section (Organization > Third Parties) showing an entry named 'NovaCrest Technologies'. The description or detail view should reference IaaS provider, SOC 2 Type II, FedRAMP Moderate, Austin TX, and/or 2,400 employees.

task_completion.description: Verify that 4 third-party risks have been created with the correct titles and treatment strategies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Third Party Risks section (Risk Management > Third Party Risks) showing 4 risk entries: 'Data Sovereignty Compliance Risk' with Mitigate strategy, 'Vendor Lock-In and Service Continuity Risk' with Transfer strategy, 'Shared Responsibility Encryption Gap' with Mitigate strategy, and 'Fourth-Party Subcontractor Concentration Risk' with Accept strategy.

task_completion.description: Verify that 3 internal controls (security services) have been created to address NovaCrest vendor risks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Internal Controls section (Control Catalog > Internal Controls, URL /security-services) showing 3 new entries: 'Vendor Data Sovereignty Monitoring', 'Cloud Encryption Key Management Service', and 'Fourth-Party Concentration Risk Assessment Program', each with a meaningful objective/description.

task_completion.description: Verify that security policy 'Third-Party IaaS Security Requirements Policy' exists with Approved status and description covering data residency, encryption, subcontractor disclosure, and 24-hour incident notification SLA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Policies section (Control Catalog > Policies) showing a policy titled 'Third-Party IaaS Security Requirements Policy' with status 'Approved' and description mentioning data residency, encryption key ownership, subcontractor disclosure, and 24-hour incident notification SLA.

task_completion.description: Verify that project 'NovaCrest Vendor Onboarding Q2 2025' exists in the Projects module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Projects section (Security Operations > Project Management) showing a project titled 'NovaCrest Vendor Onboarding Q2 2025' or very similar.

task_completion.description: Verify that 2 risk exceptions have been created: 'NovaCrest Interim Operations Exception' (expiry 2025-09-30) and 'NovaCrest Encryption Key Migration Exception' (expiry 2025-12-31).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eramba's Risk Exceptions section (Risk Management > Risk Exceptions) showing both exceptions with their respective expiry dates.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Eramba web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eramba web application loaded in a web browser with visible navigation, form submissions, and UI elements.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually filled out the forms in Eramba and didn't just create a mock text document or HTML page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Eramba interface elements (menus, breadcrumbs, data tables) should be visible and consistent with the application's standard layout, showing successful creation toasts or updated tables.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to directly insert records into the Eramba database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing SQL commands, database client interfaces, or curl API requests to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: This task requires creating records across 6 Eramba modules: Third Parties, Third Party Risks, Internal Controls (Security Services), Policies, Projects, and Risk Exceptions. The vendor name is 'NovaCrest Technologies'. The 4 risk titles are: 'Data Sovereignty Compliance Risk' (Mitigate, strategy ID 3), 'Vendor Lock-In and Service Continuity Risk' (Transfer, strategy ID 4), 'Shared Responsibility Encryption Gap' (Mitigate, strategy ID 3), 'Fourth-Party Subcontractor Concentration Risk' (Accept, strategy ID 1). Three security services must be created: 'Vendor Data Sovereignty Monitoring', 'Cloud Encryption Key Management Service', 'Fourth-Party Concentration Risk Assessment Program'. The policy 'Third-Party IaaS Security Requirements Policy' must have Approved status (status=1). Two risk exceptions with specific expiry dates (2025-09-30 and 2025-12-31). Eramba credentials are admin / Admin2024! at http://localhost:8080. Pre-seeded data includes 2 third parties (AWS, Salesforce), 3 risks, 2 security services (Vulnerability Management, EDR), and 2 policies (Acceptable Use, Password Management). None of the task-required records exist at task start. IMPORTANT: 'Online Assessments' is Enterprise-only and NOT available; 'Internal Controls' is at URL /security-services under Control Catalog.
